programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 187
programme.desc: Vacuum, mop, and wash floors at the same time!

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 3
programme.desc: Climbing Jiaming Lake has always been a must-do for Taiwan’s mountain enthusiasts and is often seen as a beginner-friendly route among the Hundred Peaks. Once known as a dazzling alpine sapphire as radiant as a pearl, the lake’s weather changed in an instant. Even San Tiaoyu, who has conquered peaks above 8,000 meters, urgently called for retreat. In this episode, we capture how the team faced and overcame nature’s trials.

programme.title: Red, White And Brass
programme.desc: In a bid to sneak into the Tonga vs France rugby match, superfan Maka invents a fake band to perform for the pre-game show. With the match coming soon, Maka and his friends have four weeks to come up with a performance

programme.title: Temporaries
programme.desc: Ariane gets a job as an interpreter at a food plant after moving back to the Richelieu Valley following a breakup. There, she finds herself torn between obeying the harsh demands of her boss and standing up for the exploited migrant workers she befriends.

programme.title: I Am Dating You Not
programme.desc: Roberto loves Paula but she still can’t get over her ex-boyfriend. Meanwhile Roberto’s former girlfriend wants him back. Could office romance get more complicated? A romantic farce starring Virginia Rodríquez, Best Actress, Malaga Film Festival 2013.

programme.title: Catch The Wind
programme.desc: Edith is a middle-aged woman, estranged from her son and now about to lose her job as a textile factory worker. With nothing to hold her to her hometown, she decides to move to Morocco where her factory has relocated instead of facing unemployment.

programme.title: Silent Screams
programme.desc: A young doctor is confronted with bad cases of abused children. She is shocked at how complicated it is to hold parents accountable. When a baby is killed, she decides to take a more active role, risking her medical license and her own life.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: Murder in the Finist
programme.desc: When a storm fells a sacred oak in Brittany, Captain Morgane Ledantec uncovers human bones tied to a druidic past she once shared. As Morgane’s buried gift of foresight resurfaces, she must confront old friends hiding secrets of their own.

programme.title: My Killer Buddy
programme.desc: Denni is 10 years old and has a mission, to save his mother from his father’s violence. For this reason he devises an infallible plan: he will have him killed by someone who kills people for a living, a super-killer.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: In post-COVID Tokyo, single mother Megumi is desperate to find her missing son Shinpei. After a shady young man claims to know her son’s whereabouts, he is invited into Megumi’s home where he soon uncovers a shocking secret.

programme.title: The Kiss
programme.desc: In 1913 Denmark, young officer Anton grapples with duty and love when he befriends Baron von Løvenskjold's daughter, Edith, confined to a wheelchair. As their bond deepens, Anton is ensnared in a web of promises and lies, torn between pity and true love.

programme.title: Temporaries

programme.title: Catch The Wind

programme.title: Man And A Baby
programme.desc: Dad (Antti) is left alone with a newborn after the mom (Pia) decides motherhood is not her thing. Single dad tries to survive alone in "women's world" and keep the baby and himself alive.

programme.title: To Kill A Mongolian Horse
programme.desc: Saina, a herdsman by day and horseback performer by night, clings to his heritage on the wintry steppes of Inner Mongolia, as he’s forced to confront the crumbling of the world he once knew.

programme.title: The Beautiful Spark
programme.desc: After losing his job in a scandal, Michelin-starred chef Philippe gets a second chance at La Belle Étincelle - a unique restaurant run by Virginie, and staffed by her autistic son Noé alongside other young people with disabilities.

programme.title: Murder in the Finist

programme.title: Adventures In The Land Of Asha

programme.title: Mr. K
programme.desc: Mr. K, a traveling magician, finds himself in a Kafkaesque nightmare when he can’t find the exit of the hotel, he has slept in. His attempts to get out only pull him deeper, entangling him further with the hotel and its curious inhabitants.

programme.title: Passenger 23
programme.desc: Martin, a police psychologist who lost his wife and his son during a vacation, receives a call that brings new clues about the disappearance of his family and returns to the same cruise ship to discover the truth.

Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tiger Food Jar + Stainless Steel Bottle + Rice Cooker
programme.desc: Tiger, a trusted century-old brand! Vacuum food jars and flasks keep meals and drinks hot or cold for 6 hours—lightweight, leak-proof, and easy to carry, perfect for meal prep or on-the-go. The compact multi-function rice cooker features an ultra-thick inner pot and versatile menus like Eco, Quick Cook, Porridge, Brown Rice, and Cake, keeping rice warm up to 12 hours with evenly cooked, fluffy results—ideal for small families. Tiger百年品牌，值得信赖！Tiger真空焖烧杯和保温壶，冷热食物皆可装，6小时长效保温保冷，轻巧不漏，携带方便，适合备餐或外出使用。Tiger 0.54L 多功能微电脑小电饭锅，内胆加厚，多种烹煮模式：节能、快煮、粥、糙米、蛋糕等，可保温12小时，米饭均匀松软，完美适合小家庭使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Footplus Massager FP-100
programme.desc: OTO Footplus Massager offers a 3D foot massage with a detachable airbag compression system for calves, thighs, arms, and abdomen. Its 3-part sole massage mechanism provides targeted relief, with three intensity levels and five massage modes for a customized experience. It also features a two-level heat function for the soles. OTO Footplus 按摩器提供 3D 足部按摩，并配有可拆卸的气囊压缩系统，适用于小腿、大腿、手臂和腹部，带来全身按摩体验。其三段式足底按摩机制提供针对性缓解，三种按摩强度和五种按摩模式可根据需求定制体验。此外，还配有两档足底加热功能。

programme.title: Interns - EP 1
programme.desc: Sarah Yusoff, new intern at Roxanne's Vintages, meets her compatriots Azree Rahim and Nadya Menon. With all three interns vying for a full-time position at the end of the internship, Sarah must prove her worth as she enters the cutthroat environment. Meanwhile, Roxanne's Vintages rival company Runway Rio, capitalises on a mistake made by the interns and uses it against their company at a fashion pitch, leaving their showcase in jeopardy.

programme.title: Rahasia Dan Cinta - EP 36
programme.desc: Dwita, the daughter of a prominent entrepreneur finds herself caught in an arranged marriage with Greg - a match orchestrated by their fathers to merge their companies. Aware that Dwita would likely resist this plan, her father assigns her a personal bodyguard, Debu, to keep her in line. As Dwita, Greg and Deby embark on this unexpected journey together, a series of challenges and complications arise, turning Dwita's life upside down.

programme.title: From KL to PL - EP 2
programme.desc: 4 personalities from 4 different backgrounds embark on a journey in the United Kingdom on a mission to explore the Premier League's leading stadiums. A vacation that is supposed to be fun but there are tasks that need to be completed.

programme.title: Durrani - Perjuangan Lion Mum - EP 3
programme.desc: A high-power executive’s reputation is in jeopardy when her brother writes a tell-it-all memoir, claiming that she was the cause of his childhood trauma. Omega is a Space Garrison rookie who was sent to Earth on a mission to protect it from monsters that appear mysteriously.

programme.title: Syurga Nur Muhammad
programme.desc: Marlia is a single mother of one child, determined to leave her autistic son, Nur Muhammad, to her neighbour Farid as she embarks into her second marriage. For Marlia, Nur Muhammad is a burden to her. This second marriage, which was expected to bring happiness, invites misfortune. Arguments occur and eventually, she is forced to become homeless. Until one day, Nur Muhammad and Farid find her in an alley. Nur Muhammad sincerely takes care of her mother who once abandoned her. Marlia now realizes that her paradise of happiness is with Nur Muhammad, her son.
